creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
This issue needs the following to progress, at a minimum:

- A completed (not WIP) patch against the latest ports tree, that is
- Well QA tested

Further, there are additional considerations:

- Outstanding security issues, requiring a version update, and vuxml entry

There is a tradeoff to be made here, either:

1) Report and address the security and version update separately, unless addressing the original issue reported here *requires* a version update.

The separate issue should "Depend On" this issue being committed/resolved/merged first.

OR

2) Address all issues in this bug in a single patch.
